test_cases.name: create_author_valid

test_cases.name: create_author_invalid_data

test_cases.description: Requesting a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.description: Create a book with valid fields.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an existing ISBN.

test_cases.description: Verify pagination parameters work correctly.

test_cases.name: delete_already_deleted_book

test_cases.name: restore_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore a soft-deleted book.

test_cases.description: Apply a valid discount to an old book.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_new_book
test_cases.description: Discounting a book published less than 1 year ago fails.

test_cases.name: update_stock_positive
test_cases.description: Increase stock with positive quantity.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_invalid_type
test_cases.description: Upload non-image file type.

test_cases.description: Add a valid review to a book.

test_cases.name: create_review_empty_body
test_cases.description: Review submission without content fails.

test_cases.name: create_order_valid
test_cases.description: Create a valid order.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Order fails if book stock is insufficient.

test_cases.name: update_status_invalid_transition
test_cases.description: Transition from pending to delivered is invalid.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Exceeding bulk rate limit returns 429.

test_cases.name: start_book_export

test_cases.name: poll_nonexistent_export

test_cases.description: Enable maintenance mode.
